title: Thoryx
description: A modpack focused around tech and and power
body:
A heavy automation modpack built around Create, Mekanism, Refined Storage, and CC: Tweaked.
Build and expand your factory with Create and its many addons, scale up your processing with Mekanism, manage your storage with Refined Storage, and automate and monitor everything with CC: Tweaked. Explore a world overhauled by Biomes O' Plenty and Terralith, travel your rail network with Steam 'n' Rails, keep your hunger up with Farmer's Delight, and gear up with Epic Knights. Distant Horizons lets you take it all in from a distance.

_The factory must grow_

**Credits to P1XZL for the icon image.**
